title: Sales Manager Vacancy at NoBroker - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at NoBroker - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Sales Manager looking for your next big career move? NoBroker in Madurai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About NoBroker:
NoBroker is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NoBroker!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
